recommendations.title: The Strange Color of Your Body's Tears
recommendations.overview: Returning home from a business trip to discover his wife missing, a man delves deeper and deeper into a surreal kaleidoscope of half-baked leads, seduction, deceit, and murder.

recommendations.title: Let the Corpses Tan
recommendations.overview: With a heavy haul of 250 kilograms of gold bullion, the grizzled criminal mastermind, Rhino, and his ruthless gang of cutthroats, head to a ramshackle retreat somewhere in the Mediterranean to lay low on a scorching day of July. However, the unexpect

recommendations.title: Alien: Romulus
recommendations.overview: While scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station, a group of young space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life form in the universe.

recommendations.title: La luna

recommendations.title: The ABCs of Death

recommendations.director: Bruno Forzani, Hélène Cattet, Adrián García Bogliano, Jon Schnepp, Ernesto Díaz Espinoza, Xavier Gens, Jorge Michel Grau, Yudai Yamaguchi, Banjong Pisanthanakun, Ti West, Jason Eisener, Jake West, Adam Wingard, Timo Tjahjanto, Simon Rumley, Kaare Andrews, Noboru Iguchi, Andrew Traucki, Ben Wheatley, Thomas Cappelen Malling, Marcel Sarmiento, Lee Hardcastle, Yoshihiro Nishimura, Srđan Spasojević, Anders Morgenthaler, Angela Bettis, Nacho Vigalondo

recommendations.title: Young Hearts
recommendations.overview: 14-year-old Elias increasingly feels like an outsider in his village. When he meets his new neighbour of the same age, Alexander, Elias is confronted with his burgeoning sexuality.

recommendations.title: Taste of Fear
recommendations.overview: A wheelchair-bound young girl returns to her father's estate after ten years, and although she's told he's away, she keeps seeing his dead body on the estate.

recommendations.title: For Sama
recommendations.overview: A love letter from a young mother to her daughter, the film tells the story of Waad al-Kateab’s life through five years of the uprising in Aleppo, Syria as she falls in love, gets married and gives birth to Sama, all while cataclysmic conflict rises

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.
